1.gl: Shushan-Eduth or Shoshannim-Eduth, the title of a popular song
1.dv: or (plural of former) שׁוֹשַׁנִּים עֵדוּתlemma שׁוֹשַׁנִּיס עֵדוּת samekh, corrected to שׁוֹשַׁנִּים עֵדוּת; from H7799 (שׁוּשַׁן) and H5715 (עֵדוּת);

1.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
1.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
1.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

1.gl: properly, to goad, i.e. (by implication) to teach (the rod being an Oriental incentive)
1.kj: (un-) accustomed, [idiom] diligently, expert, instruct, learn, skilful, teach(-er, -ing).

1.gl: David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

2.gl: to turn back (hence, away) transitively or intransitively, literally or figuratively (not necessarily with the idea of return to the starting point); generally to retreat; often adverbial, again
2.kj: ((break, build, circumcise, dig, do anything, do evil, feed, lay down, lie down, lodge, make, rejoice, send, take, weep)) [idiom] again, (cause to) answer ([phrase] again), [idiom]

2.gl: to strike (lightly or severely, literally or figuratively)
2.kj: beat, cast forth, clap, give (wounds), [idiom] go forward, [idiom] indeed, kill, make (slaughter), murderer, punish, slaughter, slay(-er, -ing), smite(-r, -ing), strike, be stricke
(eigh-, fif-, four-, nine-, seven-, six-, thir-) teen(-th), [phrase] eleven(-th), [phrase] sixscore thousand, [phrase] twelve(-th).

2.gl: properly, to go forth, i.e. (by implication) to be expelled, and (consequently) desolate; causatively, to lay waste; also (specifically), to quarrel

2.kj: both, couple, double, second, twain, [phrase] twelfth, [phrase] twelve, [phrase] twenty (sixscore) thousand, twice, two.

2.gl: a gorge (from its lofty sides; hence, narrow, but not a gully or winter-torrent)
2.dv: or (shortened) גַּי; probably (by transmutation) from the same root as H1466 (גֵּוָה) (abbreviated);

3.gl: to turn back (hence, away) transitively or intransitively, literally or figuratively (not necessarily with the idea of return to the starting point); generally to retreat; often adverbial, again
3.kj: ((break, build, circumcise, dig, do anything, do evil, feed, lay down, lie down, lodge, make, rejoice, send, take, weep)) [idiom] again, (cause to) answer ([phrase] again), [idiom]

3.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
3.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

3.gl: to break out (in many applications, direct and indirect, literal and figurative)
3.kj: [idiom] abroad, (make a) breach, break (away, down, -er, forth, in, up), burst out, come (spread) abroad, compel, disperse, grow, increase, open, press, scatter, urge.

3.dv: a primitive root meaning to push aside, i.e.

3.gl: to breathe hard, i.e. be enraged

4.gl: a fracture, figuratively, ruin; specifically, a solution (of a dream)
4.kj: affliction, breach, breaking, broken(-footed, -handed), bruise, crashing, destruction, hurt, interpretation, vexation.

4.gl: to undulate (as the earth, the sky, etc.; also a field of grain), particularly through fear; specifically, to spring (as a locust)
4.kj: make afraid, (re-) move, quake, (make to) shake, (make to) tremble.

4.gl: to waver; by implication, to slip, shake, fall
4.kj: be carried, cast, be out of course, be fallen in decay, [idiom] exceedingly, fall(-ing down), be (re-) moved, be ready, shake, slide, slip.

4.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
4.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
4.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

4.gl: properly, to mend (by stitching), i.e. (figuratively) to cure
4.kj: cure, (cause to) heal, physician, repair, [idiom] thoroughly, make whole. See H7503 (רָפָה).

5.gl: to see, literally or figuratively (in numerous applications, direct and implied, transitive, intransitive and causative)
5.kj: advise self, appear, approve, behold, [idiom] certainly, consider, discern, (make to) enjoy, have experience, gaze, take heed, [idiom] indeed, [idiom] joyfully, lo, look (on, one a
churlish, cruel, grievous, hard((-hearted), thing), heavy, [phrase] impudent, obstinate, prevailed, rough(-ly), sore, sorrowful, stiff(necked), stubborn, [phrase] in trouble.

5.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
to quaff, i.e. (causatively) to irrigate or furnish apotion to
5.kj: cause to (give, give to, let, make to) drink, drown, moisten, water. See H7937 (שָׁכַר), H8354 (שָׁתָה).

5.dv: from an unused root meaning to effervesce;

6.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
6.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
6.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

6.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
6.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

6.gl: to flit, i.e. vanish away (subside, escape; causatively, chase, impel, deliver)
6.kj: [idiom] abate, away, be displayed, (make to) flee (away, -ing), put to flight, [idiom] hide, lift up a standard.

6.gl: a flag; also a sail; by implication, a flagstaff; generally a signal; figuratively, a token

6.dv: or קֹשְׁטְ; from an unused root meaning to balance;

7.gl: to pull off; hence (intensively) to strip, (reflex.) to depart; by implication, to deliver, equip (for fight); present, strengthen
7.kj: arm (self), (go, ready) armed ([idiom] man, soldier), deliver, draw out, make fat, loose, (ready) prepared, put off, take away, withdraw self.

7.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor
7.kj: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.

7.gl: properly, heed, i.e. purpose; used only adverbially, on account of (as a motive or an aim), teleologically, in order that
7.kj: because of, to the end (intent) that, for (to,... 's sake), [phrase] lest, that, to.

7.gl: {properly, to eye or (generally) to heed, i.e. pay attention; by implication, to respond; by extension to begin to speak; specifically to sing, shout, testify, announce}
the right hand or side (leg, eye) of a person or other object (as the stronger and more dexterous); locally, the south

8.gl: perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue
8.kj: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), ut

8.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
8.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

8.gl: to be smooth (figuratively); by implication (as smooth stones were used for lots) to apportion or separate
8.kj: deal, distribute, divide, flatter, give, (have, im-) part(-ner), take away a portion, receive, separate self, (be) smooth(-er).

8.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
8.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

8.gl: properly, to stretch; by implication, to measure (as if by stretching a line); figuratively, to be extended

8.kj: dale, vale, valley (often used as a part of proper names). See also H1025 (בֵּית הָעֵמֶק).

9.gl: the head (as most easily shaken), whether literal or figurative (in many applications, of place, time, rank, itc.)
9.kj: band, beginning, captain, chapiter, chief(-est place, man, things), company, end, [idiom] every (man), excellent, first, forefront, (be-)head, height, (on) high(-est part, (priest)
9.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake;

9.gl: properly, to hack, i.e. engrave (Judges 5:14, to be a scribe simply); by implication, to enact (laws being cut in stone or metal tablets in primitive times) or (gen.) prescribe
9.kj: appoint, decree, governor, grave, lawgiver, note, pourtray, print, set.

9.gl: a fortified place; figuratively, a defence
9.kj: force, fort(-ress), rock, strength(-en), ([idiom] most) strong (hold).
9.dv: (also מָעוּז ); or מָעֹז (also מָעֻז; from H5810 (עָזַז);

9.gl: Ephrajim, a son of Joseph; also the tribe descended from him, and its territory
9.dv: dual of masculine form of H672 (אֶפְרָת); double fruit;

9.gl: Jehudah (or Judah), the name of five Israelites; also of the tribe descended from the first, and of its territory
Menashsheh, a grandson of Jacob, also the tribe descended from him, and its territory

10.gl: to mar (especially by breaking); figuratively, to split the ears (with sound), i.e. shout (for alarm or joy)
10.kj: blow an alarm, cry (alarm, aloud, out), destroy, make a joyful noise, smart, shout (for joy), sound an alarm, triumph.

10.gl: properly, a sandal tongue; by extension a sandal or slipper (sometimes as a symbol of occupancy, a refusal to marry, or of something valueless)
a pot; also a thorn (as springing up rapidly); by implication, a hook
10.dv: or (feminine) סִירָה; or סִרָה; (Jeremiah 52:18), from a primitive root meaning to boil up;

10.gl: Moab, an incestuous son of Lot; also his territory and descendants
10.dv: from a prolonged form of the prepositional prefix m-and H1 (אָב); from (her (the mother's)) father;

10.gl: Edom, the elder twin-brother of Jacob; hence the region (Idumaea) occupied by him
10.dv: or (fully) אֱדוֹם ; from H122 (אָדֹם); red (see Genesis 25:25);

10.gl: to throw out, down or away (literally or figuratively)
10.kj: adventure, cast (away, down, forth, off, out), hurl, pluck, throw.

11.gl: who? (occasionally, by a peculiar idiom, of things); also (indefinitely) whoever; often used in oblique construction with prefix or suffix
11.kj: any (man), [idiom] he, [idiom] him, [phrase] O that! what, which, who(-m, -se, -soever), [phrase] would to God.
11.dv: an interrogative pronoun of persons, as H4100 (מָה) is of things,

11.gl: something hemming in, i.e. (objectively) a mound (of besiegers), (abstractly) a siege, (figuratively) distress; or (subjectively) a fastness
11.kj: besieged, bulwark, defence, fenced, fortress, siege, strong (hold), tower.

11.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
11.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
11.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

11.gl: Edom, the elder twin-brother of Jacob; hence the region (Idumaea) occupied by him
11.dv: or (fully) אֱדוֹם ; from H122 (אָדֹם); red (see Genesis 25:25);

11.gl: to guide; by implication, to transport (into exile, or as colonists)
11.kj: bestow, bring, govern, guide, lead (forth), put, straiten.

11.gl: properly, to flow; causatively, to bring (especially with pomp)

12.gl: to go (causatively, bring) out, in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively, direct and proxim.
12.kj: [idiom] after, appear, [idiom] assuredly, bear out, [idiom] begotten, break out, bring forth (out, up), carry out, come (abroad, out, thereat, without), [phrase] be condemned, depa

12.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
12.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

12.gl: a mass of persons (or figuratively, things), especially reg. organized forwar (an army); by implication, a campaign, literally or figuratively (specifically, hardship, worship)
12.kj: appointed time, ([phrase]) army, ([phrase]) battle, company, host, service, soldiers, waiting upon, war(-fare).

12.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
12.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel
a primitive root meaning to push aside, i.e.
